title: An Investigational Study to Evaluate Experimental Medication BMS-986165 Compared to Placebo in Participants With Plaque Psoriasis (POETYK-PSO-3) in Mainland China, Taiwan, and South Korea

eligibility.text: Plaque psoriasis for at least 6 months
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures a sufficient duration of disease to detect treatment effects.
This criterion helps identify patients who are likely to respond to the intervention, maximizing statistical power.

eligibility.text: Candidate for phototherapy or systemic therapy
eligibility.justification: This criterion ensures that the patient is eligible for treatment and can be monitored effectively.
This criterion excludes patients with other types of psoriasis, potentially protecting them from harm.
This criterion protects patients from potential complications related to infections.
This criterion ensures that the patient has not previously received the drug, potentially protecting them from harm.
This is a general statement and does not fall into any specific category.
